failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch timed out, so the agent could not retrieve the product evidence needed to determine whether item 1507389580 has RAM=8GB.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal and plan were correct: use ProductCatalogSearch with the provided item_id and product_id, then answer from returned evidence. The tool invocation at index 3 was well-formed and used the required arguments. The failure was an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style tool error: the catalog dependency timed out after 30000ms. There is no evidence later that the timeout was resolved or that the missing catalog evidence became available.
